data.description: An unselected setlist row displays the total knot count as though every knot is unshipped — it does not filter out knots already in terminal states. Selecting the setlist corrects the count (drops to the true remaining number, often 0). The bug is in how knots-remaining is computed for the unselected/collapsed row state: it counts all knots rather than only those in non-terminal states. Selecting the row should not be required to get an accurate count.
